name: Simmons ❭❱ 'Awkward'

⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀SPOILERS FOR MOVIE AHEAD 🐬

Thank you for the excuse to do Simmons, I loved the idea anon. Writer's block and college are absolute bitches, sorry it took so long to get this out.ᐟ

It has been nearly a whole year, .

Trying a new definition style out, please let me know thoughts!

I now have a roster:

Alt version of this bot will come out first with the entire Red Army cast. Saw the opportunity for angst and took it.

Self-indulgent Felix bot is next after the alt, sorry to those who've been waiting for a while for their requests.
